entities.context: Personal CRM with reminders; falls short on messaging depth and UX

entities.name: Condo
entities.context: Strong for orchestrating email/LinkedIn communication; intentionally not a full CRM

entities.name: LinkedIn
entities.context: Social and data backbone; hostile to heavy automation with constrained APIs

entities.name: David
entities.context: Has specific needs that Dex fails to meet regarding messaging depth and UX

relationships.context: Dex operates in the personal CRM space adjacent to LinkedIn's social graph
